titleStmt.title: SII 38.533: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 533. (A.R. No. 533 of 1912.) TIRUNĪRMALAI, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPET DISTRICT. On the east wall, Nīrvaṇṇar shrine, Raṅganātha perumāḷ temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachchakkaravartti Rājarājadēva (III) Year 7, Tulā [2]6, ba. di. [2] Kārttigai, Sunday = 23 October 1222 A.D.

summary.p: States that Aruḷāḷa-bhaṭṭan Tiruvēṭṭai Aḻagiyān, of Bhāradvāja [gōtra], a priest of temple at Tirunīrmalai in Surattūr-nāḍu, in Puliyūr-kōṭṭam (a sub-division of) Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam, received 1(1/2) paḻaṅkāśu from Kaikaiyarāyaṉ Tiruvagattīśvaramuḍaiyāṉ of Malaiyambākkam in Māṅgāḍu-nāḍu of the same division. The gift was made in order to burn a perpetual lamp at the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīirācarājatevaṟkku yāṇṭu 7 vatu tulānāyaṟṟu [2 10]cā nti
yatiyum Aparapakṣattu dvitikaiyuṅ kārttikai nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyumāṉa nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭala
ttu puliyuṟkoṭṭattu curattūrnāṭṭu tirunirmalai Emperumāṉukku Ikkoṭṭattu māṅkāṭṭu nāṭṭu (ma)
malaiyampākkattu kaiykaiyarāyan tiruvakatticuramuṭaiyān vaitta cantiviḷakku Oṉṟukku Ik
koyilil kāṇiyuṭaiya nampimāril bhāradvāji Aruḷāḷapaṭṭan tiruveṭṭaiaḻakiyānen kaikko
ṇṭa paḻaṅkācu 1 Ippaḻaṅkācu OṉṟaraiyuṅkoṇThe letter ṇ is engraved below the line.ṭu Ittiruviḷakku cantirātittavarai celuttak kaṭavenāka
cammatittu kaikkoṇṭeṉ Aruḷālapaṭṭan tiruveṭṭai Aḻakiyānen § hari Om
Digital edition of SII 38.533 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
